description: Normalizer event tap: Extend `result-normalizer.js` to emit structured `tool_use` events (tool name, timestamp) to a callback or event emitter during `runAndNormalize()`. Currently normalizer only returns `{ text, result }` — tool events are consumed but not surfaced.

completions.notes: Stale-row reconcile (sweep 2026-06-16). Normalizer event tap shipped (Wave 3 03ebfff): result-normalizer.js onToolUse emits structured {tool,input,timestamp} from runAndNormalize, consumed in build.js. feature.json never reconciled from PLANNED.
